ssh_key_auth.detail: key-based login works, no password prompt

ufw.detail: active, default-deny, SSH allowed from 99.22.37.25 only

root_password_login.detail: PermitRootLogin yes AND PasswordAuthentication yes — must go key-only

ollama_exposure.detail: listening 0.0.0.0:11434 (all interfaces). UFW allows only SSH inbound so it is NOT publicly reachable today, but binding to 0.0.0.0 is a latent hole — one UFW mistake exposes an unauthenticated model API. Bind to tailscale/localhost.

disk.detail: 93% full — 20G disk, 1.4G free, 7.1G docker. Cannot deploy Postgres + HELM stack safely. Needs prune (0.8G reclaimable) AND likely a volume resize.

postgres.detail: not installed — will deploy in Phase 3

existing_helm_services.detail: 5 systemd units ALREADY run HELM code from /root/hoch_agent_swarm (helm-runner, has-agent-dispatcher, hoch-ag-execution-daemon, hasf-product-factory, hoch-relay-telemetry). A SECOND HELM already lives on this box. Migrating a new control plane here risks TWO active schedulers -- the exact thing the directive forbids. Must reconcile or stop these first.
